bugs.title: Three pre-existing Phase 4 gametest regressions blocking the 16/16 chiseledRunGametest criterion (out of Phase 5 scope)
bugs.evidence: combathooksgametest.heavysweepguarddoesnotboostsecondary, combathooksgametest.vanillaironswordcarriesfinessehook, and tooltipinjectiongametest.vanillaironswordtooltipcontainsstatblock fail with assertion errors on 1.20.1, 1.21.1, 1.21.4, and 26.1.2. They predate Phase 5 and were masked by compile failures in cycles 1 and 2.
bugs.expected: 16/16 gametests pass per version (Task 4 acceptance criterion)
bugs.suggested_fix: Open a separate Phase 4 follow-up cycle. The verification doc has been updated to document this scope split: Phase 5 acquisition is GREEN, full chiseledRunGametest remains HOLD pending Phase 4 fixes.

bugs.title: 26.1.2 smithing gametest regression (Phase 4, out of Phase 5 scope)
bugs.evidence: 26.1.2 only: dndweapons:smithing_gametest_netherite_fire_immunity_fires fails. Specific to the 26.1.2 fork; Phase 4 work.
bugs.suggested_fix: Phase 4 26.1.2 smithing template fork investigation; not in Phase 5 plan scope.
